name: 03-local-apply
title: Local apply (Slice 3)
description: Implement confighub apply: load bundle, verify manifest+checksums, validate target paths, render diff, backup, atomic write, apply log; plus confighub diff, status, rollback, doctor:apply; honor removedFiles and managed-section marker blocks; reject symlink targets by default; per-profile apply.lock.
creator: Ruichen Zhou
